Ntc Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Cory Mcculloch And 321 Henderson Recievables, Lp., Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Augene Ahtirski, Esq., (818) 779-0997, appeared telephonically through Court Call for Petitioner and Moving Party
Cory McCulloch, (408) 605-8118, also present
RULING:
Hearing held. Mr. Ahtirski represented to the Court that parties stipulated for approval for transfer. PETITIONER 321 HENDERSON RECEIVABLES, L.P.'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Cory Mcculloch And 321 Henderson Receivables, L.P., Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/dm) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
